ddls:
CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "province_state" TEXT /* Province or state name */,
  "country_region" TEXT /* Country or region name */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the location */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the location */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the location */,
  "area" REAL /* Area of the location */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the location */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the location data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cases" (
  "case_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each case entry */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the location where the cases were reported */,
  "date_time" TEXT /* Date and time when the case count was reported */,
  "case_count" INTEGER /* Number of COVID-19 cases reported */,
  "deaths" INTEGER /* Number of deaths */,
  "recovered" INTEGER /* Number of recovered cases */,
  "active_cases" INTEGER /* Number of active cases */,
  "case_type" TEXT /* Type of cases (e.g., confirmed, probable, suspected) */,
  "source" TEXT /* Source of the data */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the case data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_cases_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., public health official, data analyst, admin) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department or team the user belongs to */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login time of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the report was generated */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_content" TEXT /* Content of the report */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of the report (e.g., daily, weekly, monthly) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualizations" (
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each visualization */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the visualization */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was generated */,
  "visualization_content" TEXT /* Content of the visualization */,
  "visualization_type" TEXT /* Type of the visualization (e.g., bar chart, line graph) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the visualization (e.g., draft, published) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Last update of the visualization */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("visualization_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualizations_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "permission_name" TEXT /* Name of the permission */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the permission */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role assigned to the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id", "role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "role_permissions" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* ID of the role */,
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* ID of the permission assigned to the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id", "permission_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "visualization_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "visualization_id" INTEGER /* ID of the visualization being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the visualization */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the visualization was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_visualization_access_visualization_id FOREIGN KEY ("visualization_id") REFERENCES visualizations ("visualization_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "case_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "case_id" INTEGER /* ID of the case data being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the case data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the case data was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_case_id FOREIGN KEY ("case_id") REFERENCES cases ("case_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_case_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
